headline: Is KeyCorp (KEY) Pricing Look Interesting After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: This article examines whether KeyCorp's current share price reflects what the business is really worth by breaking down how the market may be pricing the stock today versus several valuation yardsticks. KeyCorp shares last closed at US$19.41, with returns of 2.7% over 7 days, an 11.5% decline over 30 days, a 7.5% decline year to date, 25.7% over 1 year, 93.1% over 3 years and 22.6% over 5 years, providing a range of time frames to consider value and risk.
